title: Model attributes should follow the Java identifier naming convention
description: Ensures that model attribute names in Spring applications conform to Java identifier naming conventions, improving code readability and preventing runtime issues.
recommendation: Use valid Java identifiers for all model attribute names. Avoid using reserved words, special characters, or starting names with digits.
impact: Non-compliant model attribute names can lead to runtime errors, reduce code clarity, and hinder maintainability.

checks.message: Model attribute names should follow Java identifier naming conventions
